name: Flame Hyenard
description:
Flame Hyenard is a minor antagonist from Megaman X7. He is a member of a group of self proclaimed Maverick Hunters called "Red Alert" led by Red however their methods of disposing of Mavericks were outside the law thus he and the other members were labeled Mavericks themselves. He was later one of the members afflicted with adverse side effects due to enhancements by "The Professor", causing their allegiance to be under the professor's will rather than Red's. He now takes control over an industrial complex as well as operating a large gazelle-modeled mechaniloid awaiting to challenge by the Maverick Hunters themselves while also dealing with immense mental pain, a side effect of his enhancements.

Flame Hyenard is an average-sized Reploid with the design of a hyena. His armor is sandy brown and black, with various vents and exhaust holes located around his body. One of his shoulders is normally open, constantly emitting a small stream of fire.

As a fire-based reploid he can launch fire from the vent openings of his back and shoulders as well as his hands. He also possesses great agility in combat and utilizes the artillery power of his gazelle mechaniloid.
creator: AnimeMan1993
